games.reasoning: Astros bounce back at home after opening loss with superior rotation depth. Angels' hot start unlikely sustainable against Houston's veteran lineup and bullpen advantage.
Mariners at T-Mobile Park with revenge factor after opening series loss. Seattle's pitching staff typically performs better at home, and Cleveland may struggle with West Coast travel in early season.
Dodgers' superior depth and home field advantage at Dodger Stadium creates value despite heavy favorite status. Arizona's early season struggles continue against elite competition.
Tigers showing early season life with improved offensive approach. Padres still adjusting after roster changes, and the plus-money on Detroit provides solid value for upset potential.
